response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setups)
Proven technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with demonstrable impact (iOS app top 10, GIS platforms)
concerns: No clear record of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning at scale
Mobile platform experience is limited to iOS app maintenance, not ecosystem-wide tooling or testing infrastructure
